calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jul-08-2025 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-18-2025 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jul-02-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kerry Sykes appeared by zoom for and with Tara Tate by zoom and for and with Hilary Clendenning by zoom.

The court asked Mrs. Sykes to address Probate Code 6124. Mrs. Sykes stated that the decedent had a very messy office, that he told his daughter Tara in 2015 that the will was on the right side of the desk and handed her a copy of the will, and that the decedent was a CPA and had about 15 to 20 boxes of personal and clients' files. Mrs. Sykes also stated that there are about 100 boxes going back to the 80's, that her clients believe he misfiled the will, and that she (Mrs. Sykes) believes the appropriate of date of the will is August 27, 2015, because the decedent wrote the will on one day and signed it on another day when the neighbor could come over and witness it. The court will grant the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The lost will dated August 27, 2015, is admitted to probate. Tara Tate and Hilary Clendenning are appointed as the Co-Administrators of the estate with will annexed with full authority. Bond is not required. Order to be signed. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for July 8, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will go off calendar. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.
